ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which economic data is collected */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the year is the current year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., 90, 91, 92) */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the economic indicator (e.g., trade balance, economic growth) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the data is collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the data is collected */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade balance */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the trade balance is calculated */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the trade balance is calculated */,
  "balance" REAL /* Trade balance value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade balance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the trade balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_balances_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_balances_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shock_factors" (
  "shock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shock factor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the shock factor is calculated */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the shock factor is calculated */,
  "shock" INTEGER /* Shock factor value */,
  "shock_type" TEXT /* Type of shock factor (e.g., natural disaster, economic crisis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the shock factor */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the shock factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shock_factors_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shock_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic growth rate */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the economic growth rate is calculated */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the economic growth rate is calculated */,
  "growth" REAL /* Economic growth rate value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the economic growth rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the economic growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_growth_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_growth_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the economic data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that includes the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data included in the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data for which the version is created */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version for which the change was made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
